Türkçe

We are in the Top 300 in THE 2025 Asian Universities Ranking!

Times Higher Education (THE), one of the most respected organizations evaluating the achievements of higher education institutions in the world, announced the Asian Universities Ranking for 2025. Our university has achieved a significant international success by ranking in the 251-300 band in this prestigious list.

Our university ranked 268th in the overall ranking and 11th in Turkey. In the research ecosystem category, we ranked 101st among Asian universities and 5th in Turkey.

THE Asian University Rankings assess universities based on key indicators such as teaching quality, research strength, citation impact, international visibility and industry collaborations. The 2025 ranking reflects the current performance of higher education institutions in the Asian region in line with these criteria.

Our Rector Prof. Dr. Sondan Durukanoğlu Feyiz made the following statements regarding this success

“At Kadir Has University, we have redefined the concept of university. I believe that we have achieved this success in an organic and sustainable way with the devoted work of our academic staff, the active participation of our students in the research processes and the strong research ecosystem we have established.

Being ranked in international rankings, beyond prestige, shows us that we are on the right track. With this perspective, we will continue to work with determination together with our professors, students and all our teammates with the goal of taking our achievements in the international education world even further and ranking in the top 500 in the world rankings and in the top 150 in the Asian rankings.”
